title: Haseen Dillruba
tmdbOverview: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.
synopsis: Released in 2021, Haseen Dillruba is a romance, mystery and thriller film from India. It carries a 6.9 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
